# RPCA — Ranchi Players Cricket Academy

> A coach-led cricket academy in Ranchi, Jharkhand, India. RPCA trains 100+ cricketers aged 7 to 19+
> at DIG Ground, Bariatu, on two turf & matting nets, with a structured pathway toward JSCA age-group
> and state cricket.

- **Location:** DIG Ground, Bariatu, Ranchi, Jharkhand 834001, India
- **Phone / WhatsApp:** +91 70049 41788
- **Instagram:** @rpca_cricket_academy_ranchi
- **Batches:** morning and evening; ages 7–19+; group batches and one-on-one coaching
- **Coaches:** Ashutosh Mishra, and Yuvraj Kumar — a JSCA-registered Jharkhand all-rounder who has
  played Jharkhand T20 cricket for the Ranchi Titans
- **Facilities:** two turf & matting nets, programmable bowling machine, video analysis

## Pages

- [Home](https://www.ranchicricket.com/): overview of the academy, the ground and the pathway
- [Programs](https://www.ranchicricket.com/programs.html): Foundation (7–12), Development (13–16), Elite Pathway (17+), plus group vs one-on-one formats
- [Coaches](https://www.ranchicricket.com/coaches.html): Ashutosh Mishra and Yuvraj Kumar
- [Gallery](https://www.ranchicricket.com/gallery.html): photographs and clips from the nets, match days and tournaments
- [FAQ](https://www.ranchicricket.com/faq.html): joining, ages, timings, fees, location, one-on-one coaching, the JSCA pathway
- [Contact](https://www.ranchicricket.com/contact.html): book a trial

## Notes

- Fees vary by age group and format; the academy quotes them directly on Instagram or by phone.
- The academy does not publish a founding date.
